Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. ifc = [
    # Wheels available for many platforms; pin floor for repeatable CI.
    "ifcopenshell>=0.8.1,<0.9",
]

dxf = [
    # FED-04: DXF underlay parser. Pure-Python; no native deps.
    "ezdxf>=1.4,<2",
]

[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
packages = ["bim_ai"]

[tool.ruff]
line-length = 100
target-version = "py312"
extend-exclude = [".venv", "__pycache__", "node_modules"]

[tool.ruff.lint]
select = ["E", "F", "I", "B", "UP", "W"]
ignore = ["E501"]

[tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores]
"bim_ai/routes_api.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_exports.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_commands.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_activity.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_sketch.py" = ["B008"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]
asyncio_mode = "auto"
addopts = "--cov=bim_ai --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=65"

[tool.coverage.run]
source = ["bim_ai"]
omit = ["bim_ai/export_ifc.py"]

[tool.coverage.report]
exclude_lines = [
    "pragma: no cover",
    "if TYPE_CHECKING:",
    "raise NotImplementedError",
]

# bim-ai monorepo Makefile — mirrors collaboration-ai ergonomics.

_HOF_OS_IMPORT_DB := $(DATABASE_URL)
_HOF_OS_IMPORT_JWT := $(HOF_SUBAPP_JWT_SECRET)
ifneq ($(and $(strip $(_HOF_OS_IMPORT_JWT)),$(strip $(_HOF_OS_IMPORT_DB))),)
DATABASE_URL := $(_HOF_OS_IMPORT_DB)
HOF_SUBAPP_JWT_SECRET := $(_HOF_OS_IMPORT_JWT)
HOFOS_SUBAPP_NATIVE := 1
endif

PYTHON ?= python3.13
APP_DIR := app
PNPM := pnpm

# Local suite port allocation:
#   2000 → bim-ai web (:8500 API)  <-- this repo (avoids 3xxx used by sister apps)
WEB_PORT ?= 2000
API_PORT ?= 8500
design ?= default

.PHONY: help install dev dev-api dev-web kill-ports seed \
	db-up db-down db-reset db-logs \
	test test-py test-js format format-check python-format-check lint architecture \
	typecheck verify build clean

help:
	@echo "bim-ai Makefile"
	@echo "  install   — pnpm + Python venv"
	@echo "  dev       — db-up + API + Web (:$(API_PORT) / :$(WEB_PORT)); make dev design=conservative|default"
	@echo "  verify    — format-check, lint, architecture, tc, pytest, vite build"

install:
	$(PNPM) install
	cd $(APP_DIR) && $(PYTHON) -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -e ".[dev]"

db-up:
	docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d
	@echo "Postgres localhost:5545  Redis localhost:6392  MinIO http://localhost:9120"

db-down:
	docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down

db-reset:
	docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down -v
	$(MAKE) db-up

db-logs:
	docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml logs -f --tail=100

kill-ports:
	@PORTS="$(API_PORT) $(WEB_PORT)"; \
	WS_TAG="$(CURDIR)"; \
	for _ in 1 2 3 4 5 6; do \
	  for p in $$PORTS; do \
	    pids=$$(lsof -ti :$$p 2>/dev/null); \
	    [ -n "$$pids" ] && kill -9 $$pids 2>/dev/null || true; \
	  done; \
	  pkill -9 -f "vite.*$$WS_TAG"     2>/dev/null || true; \
	  pkill -9 -f "uvicorn.*$$WS_TAG"   2>/dev/null || true; \
	  pkill -9 -f "concurrently.*$$WS_TAG" 2>/dev/null || true; \
	  pkill -9 -f "turbo run dev"       2>/dev/null || true; \
	  busy=""; \
	  for p in $$PORTS; do \
	    lsof -ti :$$p >/dev/null 2>&1 && busy="$$busy $$p"; \
	  done; \
	  [ -z "$$busy" ] && exit 0; \
	  sleep 0.5; \
	done; \
	echo "kill-ports: still in use after retries:$$busy" >&2; \
	exit 1

ifeq ($(HOFOS_SUBAPP_NATIVE),1)
dev: kill-ports seed
else
dev: db-up kill-ports seed
endif
	@echo "→ API   http://127.0.0.1:$(API_PORT)/api/health"
	@echo "→ Web   http://127.0.0.1:$(WEB_PORT)"
	$(PNPM) -w exec concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta \
	  "$(MAKE) dev-api" \
	  "$(MAKE) dev-web"

dev-api:
	cd $(APP_DIR) && PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn bim_ai.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port $(API_PORT) --reload

dev-web:
	API_PORT=$(API_PORT) VITE_DESIGN_SYSTEM=$(design) $(PNPM) --filter @bim-ai/web dev --port $(WEB_PORT) --host 127.0.0.1 --strictPort

seed:
	cd $(APP_DIR) && PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python scripts/seed.py

test: test-py test-js

test-py:
	cd $(APP_DIR) && PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q

test-js:
	$(PNPM) -w turbo test

format:
	$(PNPM) -w prettier --write "**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,yml,yaml}"
	cd $(APP_DIR) && .venv/bin/ruff format bim_ai tests scripts

format-check:
	$(PNPM) -w prettier --check "**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,yml,yaml}"

python-format-check:
	cd $(APP_DIR) && .venv/bin/ruff format --check bim_ai tests scripts

lint:
	$(PNPM) -w eslint "packages/**/*.{ts,tsx}"
	cd $(APP_DIR) && .venv/bin/ruff check bim_ai tests scripts

architecture:
	node scripts/check-architecture.mjs

typecheck:
	$(PNPM) -w turbo typecheck

build:
	$(PNPM) -w turbo build

verify: format-check python-format-check lint architecture typecheck test build
	@echo "verify: PASS"

clean:
	$(PNPM) -w turbo clean || true
	rm -rf node_modules **/node_modules **/dist **/.turbo
	rm -rf $(APP_DIR)/.venv $(APP_DIR)/.pytest_cache

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  js:
    # Keep Playwright screenshot tests off `ubuntu-latest`, whose image churn
    # can shift flex layout/heights against committed Linux baselines.
    runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
    timeout-minutes: 25
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      # packageManager field in repo root package.json selects the pnpm version (do not duplicate here).

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: pnpm

      - run: pnpm install

      - run: pnpm verify

      - run: cd packages/web && pnpm exec playwright install chromium --with-deps

      - run: cd packages/web && pnpm exec playwright test
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Evidence CI correlation hint (bundles reviewer mapping)
        if: always()
        env:
          CORR_RUN_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
          CORR_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          CORR_WORKFLOW: ${{ github.workflow }}
          CORR_JOB: ${{ github.job }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p packages/web/test-results
          {
            echo "Map Playwright PNGs to semantic evidence fields:"
            echo "  GET /api/models/{id}/evidence-package -> suggestedEvidenceArtifactBasename,"
            echo "  semanticDigestPrefix16, suggestedEvidenceBundleFilenames.evidencePackageJson,"
            echo "  deterministicSheetEvidence[].correlation + playwrightSuggestedFilenames (png/svg/pdf/rasterPlaceholderProbe),"
            echo "  deterministicSheetEvidence[].printRasterPngHref + sheetPrintRasterIngest_v1"
            echo "    (svgContentSha256, placeholderPngSha256, diffCorrelation.playwrightBaselineSlot e.g. pngFullSheet),"
            echo "  GET /api/models/{id}/exports/sheet-print-raster.png — deterministic 128×112 print-surrogate PNG (96px viewport layout stamp + 16px titleblock band + SVG salt);"
            echo "    response headers: X-Bim-Ai-Sheet-Print-Raster-Contract, X-Bim-Ai-Sheet-Svg-Sha256, width/height."
            echo "  deterministicPlanViewEvidence[].playwrightSuggestedFilenames.pngPlanCanvas,"
            echo "  deterministicSectionCutEvidence[].playwrightSuggestedFilenames.pngSectionViewport,"
            echo "  deterministic3dViewEvidence[].playwrightSuggestedFilenames.pngViewport."
            echo "  evidenceClosureReview_v1.expectedDeterministicPngBasenames — flat CI grep target vs PNG artifact names;"
            echo "  evidenceClosureReview_v1.pixelDiffExpectation — reserved metadata when attaching programmatic diff outputs;"
            echo "  evidenceClosureReview_v1.screenshotHintGaps_v1 — deterministic rows missing required Playwright PNG filename slots;"
            echo "  evidenceLifecycleSignal_v1 — programmatic rollup (counts + digest + basename) for scripts/agents;"
            echo "  evidenceClosureReview_v1.pixelDiffExpectation.artifactIngestCorrelation_v1.ingestManifestDigestSha256 — deterministic SHA-256 over canonical ingest checklist pairs (sorted baseline/diff basenames)."
            echo "  evidenceLifecycleSignal_v1.artifactIngestManifestDigestSha256 — mirrors ingest correlation digest when pixelDiffExpectation carries artifactIngestCorrelation_v1."
            echo "  evidenceDiffIngestFixLoop_v1.blockerCodes — grep: artifact_ingest_correlation_digest_mismatch (ingest correlation digest must match ingestChecklist_v1.targets recompute)."
            echo "  evidenceDiffIngestFixLoop_v1 — derivative blocker rollup (correlation, screenshot slots, pixel diff ingest, artifact_ingest_correlation_digest_mismatch) + agent remediate action hook."
            echo "  evidenceReviewPerformanceGate_v1 — advisory mock gate (gateClosed, blockerCodesEcho, advisoryBudgetHintsMs_v1); derived from evidenceDiffIngestFixLoop_v1 only; no wall-clock probes."
            echo "  evidenceBaselineLifecycleReadout_v1 — per-target baseline lifecycle rollup (committedFixtureStatus, digestCorrelationStatus, suggestedNextAction, ciGateHint); digest-excluded derivative summary."
            echo "  semanticDigestSha256 omits evidenceReviewPerformanceGate_v1 (derivative rollup; stable row digests)."
            echo "  evidenceAgentFollowThrough_v1 — stagedArtifactLinks_v1 (resolutionMode, exportRelativePaths, env-gated GitHub Actions run URLs;"
            echo "    no secrets/network), plus BCF/issue coordination checks, evidenceRef gaps, replayConflict hints (digest-excluded)."
            echo "  Python pytest scale gate: test_bundle_replay_diagnostics_large_list_under_budget (replayDiagnostics metadata scan)."
            echo "  evidenceClosureReview_v1.pixelDiffExpectation.thresholdPolicy_v1 — advisory diff thresholds for client ingest."
            echo ""
            echo "This CI run:"
            echo "  github.run_id=${CORR_RUN_ID}"
            echo "  github.sha=${CORR_SHA}"
            echo "  workflow=${CORR_WORKFLOW} job=${CORR_JOB}"
            echo "  playwright artifact name=evidence-web-${CORR_RUN_ID}-playwright"
            echo ""
            echo "Recipe: download that artifact -> open packages/web/playwright-report/index.html"
            echo "  -> match failing or baseline PNG names to evidence-package deterministic* rows"
            echo "  and agentEvidenceClosureHints.ciArtifactRelativePaths."
          } > packages/web/test-results/ci-evidence-correlation-hint.txt

      - name: Upload Playwright report + screenshots
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: evidence-web-${{ github.run_id }}-playwright
          retention-days: 14
          path: |
            packages/web/playwright-report
            packages/web/test-results
            packages/web/e2e/__screenshots__/evidence-baselines/evidence-baselines.spec.ts

  python:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: app
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

[project]
name = "bim-ai-app"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "BIM AI FastAPI backend (browser-first BIM v1)."
requires-python = ">=3.12"
dependencies = [
    "fastapi>=0.115",
    "uvicorn[standard]>=0.32",
    "sqlalchemy[asyncio]>=2.0",
    "asyncpg>=0.30",
    "pydantic>=2.9",
    "pydantic-settings>=2.6",
    "python-multipart>=0.0.12",
    "reportlab>=4.2",
    "numpy>=1.26",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = [
    "pytest>=8.3",
    "pytest-asyncio>=0.24",
    "pytest-cov>=6.0",
    "ruff>=0.7",
]

ifc = [
    # Wheels available for many platforms; pin floor for repeatable CI.
    "ifcopenshell>=0.8.1,<0.9",
]

dxf = [
    # FED-04: DXF underlay parser. Pure-Python; no native deps.
    "ezdxf>=1.4,<2",
]

[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
packages = ["bim_ai"]

[tool.ruff]
line-length = 100
target-version = "py312"
extend-exclude = [".venv", "__pycache__", "node_modules"]

[tool.ruff.lint]
select = ["E", "F", "I", "B", "UP", "W"]
ignore = ["E501"]

[tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores]
"bim_ai/routes_api.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_exports.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_commands.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_activity.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_sketch.py" = ["B008"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]
asyncio_mode = "auto"
addopts = "--cov=bim_ai --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=65"

[tool.coverage.run]
source = ["bim_ai"]
omit = ["bim_ai/export_ifc.py"]

[tool.coverage.report]
exclude_lines = [
    "pragma: no cover",
    "if TYPE_CHECKING:",
    "raise NotImplementedError",
]

# bim-ai monorepo Makefile — mirrors collaboration-ai ergonomics.

_HOF_OS_IMPORT_DB := $(DATABASE_URL)

PYTHON ?= python3.13

	@echo "bim-ai Makefile"

	$(PNPM) install
	cd $(APP_DIR) && $(PYTHON) -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -e ".[dev]"

db-up:
	docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d
	@echo "Postgres localhost:5545  Redis localhost:6392  MinIO http://localhost:9120"

db-down:
	docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down

db-reset:
	docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml down -v
	$(MAKE) db-up

db-logs:
	docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml logs -f --tail=100

kill-ports:
	@PORTS="$(API_PORT) $(WEB_PORT)"; \
	WS_TAG="$(CURDIR)"; \
	for _ in 1 2 3 4 5 6; do \
	  for p in $$PORTS; do \
	    pids=$$(lsof -ti :$$p 2>/dev/null); \
	    [ -n "$$pids" ] && kill -9 $$pids 2>/dev/null || true; \
	  done; \
	  pkill -9 -f "vite.*$$WS_TAG"     2>/dev/null || true; \
	  pkill -9 -f "uvicorn.*$$WS_TAG"   2>/dev/null || true; \
	  pkill -9 -f "concurrently.*$$WS_TAG" 2>/dev/null || true; \
	  pkill -9 -f "turbo run dev"       2>/dev/null || true; \
	  busy=""; \
	  for p in $$PORTS; do \
	    lsof -ti :$$p >/dev/null 2>&1 && busy="$$busy $$p"; \
	  done; \
	  [ -z "$$busy" ] && exit 0; \
	  sleep 0.5; \
	done; \
	echo "kill-ports: still in use after retries:$$busy" >&2; \
	exit 1

ifeq ($(HOFOS_SUBAPP_NATIVE),1)
dev: kill-ports seed

dev: db-up kill-ports seed
endif
	@echo "→ API   http://127.0.0.1:$(API_PORT)/api/health"

clean:

	done; \

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  js:
    # Keep Playwright screenshot tests off `ubuntu-latest`, whose image churn
    # can shift flex layout/heights against committed Linux baselines.
    runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
    timeout-minutes: 25
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      # packageManager field in repo root package.json selects the pnpm version (do not duplicate here).

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: pnpm

      - run: pnpm install

      - run: pnpm verify

      - run: cd packages/web && pnpm exec playwright install chromium --with-deps

      - run: cd packages/web && pnpm exec playwright test
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Evidence CI correlation hint (bundles reviewer mapping)
        if: always()
        env:
          CORR_RUN_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
          CORR_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          CORR_WORKFLOW: ${{ github.workflow }}
          CORR_JOB: ${{ github.job }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p packages/web/test-results
          {
            echo "Map Playwright PNGs to semantic evidence fields:"
            echo "  GET /api/models/{id}/evidence-package -> suggestedEvidenceArtifactBasename,"
            echo "  semanticDigestPrefix16, suggestedEvidenceBundleFilenames.evidencePackageJson,"
            echo "  deterministicSheetEvidence[].correlation + playwrightSuggestedFilenames (png/svg/pdf/rasterPlaceholderProbe),"
            echo "  deterministicSheetEvidence[].printRasterPngHref + sheetPrintRasterIngest_v1"
            echo "    (svgContentSha256, placeholderPngSha256, diffCorrelation.playwrightBaselineSlot e.g. pngFullSheet),"
            echo "  GET /api/models/{id}/exports/sheet-print-raster.png — deterministic 128×112 print-surrogate PNG (96px viewport layout stamp + 16px titleblock band + SVG salt);"
            echo "    response headers: X-Bim-Ai-Sheet-Print-Raster-Contract, X-Bim-Ai-Sheet-Svg-Sha256, width/height."
            echo "  deterministicPlanViewEvidence[].playwrightSuggestedFilenames.pngPlanCanvas,"
            echo "  deterministicSectionCutEvidence[].playwrightSuggestedFilenames.pngSectionViewport,"
            echo "  deterministic3dViewEvidence[].playwrightSuggestedFilenames.pngViewport."
            echo "  evidenceClosureReview_v1.expectedDeterministicPngBasenames — flat CI grep target vs PNG artifact names;"
            echo "  evidenceClosureReview_v1.pixelDiffExpectation — reserved metadata when attaching programmatic diff outputs;"
            echo "  evidenceClosureReview_v1.screenshotHintGaps_v1 — deterministic rows missing required Playwright PNG filename slots;"
            echo "  evidenceLifecycleSignal_v1 — programmatic rollup (counts + digest + basename) for scripts/agents;"
            echo "  evidenceClosureReview_v1.pixelDiffExpectation.artifactIngestCorrelation_v1.ingestManifestDigestSha256 — deterministic SHA-256 over canonical ingest checklist pairs (sorted baseline/diff basenames)."
            echo "  evidenceLifecycleSignal_v1.artifactIngestManifestDigestSha256 — mirrors ingest correlation digest when pixelDiffExpectation carries artifactIngestCorrelation_v1."
            echo "  evidenceDiffIngestFixLoop_v1.blockerCodes — grep: artifact_ingest_correlation_digest_mismatch (ingest correlation digest must match ingestChecklist_v1.targets recompute)."
            echo "  evidenceDiffIngestFixLoop_v1 — derivative blocker rollup (correlation, screenshot slots, pixel diff ingest, artifact_ingest_correlation_digest_mismatch) + agent remediate action hook."
            echo "  evidenceReviewPerformanceGate_v1 — advisory mock gate (gateClosed, blockerCodesEcho, advisoryBudgetHintsMs_v1); derived from evidenceDiffIngestFixLoop_v1 only; no wall-clock probes."
            echo "  evidenceBaselineLifecycleReadout_v1 — per-target baseline lifecycle rollup (committedFixtureStatus, digestCorrelationStatus, suggestedNextAction, ciGateHint); digest-excluded derivative summary."
            echo "  semanticDigestSha256 omits evidenceReviewPerformanceGate_v1 (derivative rollup; stable row digests)."
            echo "  evidenceAgentFollowThrough_v1 — stagedArtifactLinks_v1 (resolutionMode, exportRelativePaths, env-gated GitHub Actions run URLs;"
            echo "    no secrets/network), plus BCF/issue coordination checks, evidenceRef gaps, replayConflict hints (digest-excluded)."
            echo "  Python pytest scale gate: test_bundle_replay_diagnostics_large_list_under_budget (replayDiagnostics metadata scan)."
            echo "  evidenceClosureReview_v1.pixelDiffExpectation.thresholdPolicy_v1 — advisory diff thresholds for client ingest."
            echo ""
            echo "This CI run:"
            echo "  github.run_id=${CORR_RUN_ID}"
            echo "  github.sha=${CORR_SHA}"
            echo "  workflow=${CORR_WORKFLOW} job=${CORR_JOB}"
            echo "  playwright artifact name=evidence-web-${CORR_RUN_ID}-playwright"
            echo ""
            echo "Recipe: download that artifact -> open packages/web/playwright-report/index.html"
            echo "  -> match failing or baseline PNG names to evidence-package deterministic* rows"
            echo "  and agentEvidenceClosureHints.ciArtifactRelativePaths."
          } > packages/web/test-results/ci-evidence-correlation-hint.txt

      - name: Upload Playwright report + screenshots
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: evidence-web-${{ github.run_id }}-playwright
          retention-days: 14
          path: |
            packages/web/playwright-report
            packages/web/test-results
            packages/web/e2e/__screenshots__/evidence-baselines/evidence-baselines.spec.ts

  python:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: app
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.12'

      - run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip
      - run: python -m pip install -e ".[dev,ifc]"

      - name: Import FastAPI app (route wiring regression guard)
        run: PYTHONPATH=. python -c "from bim_ai.main import app"

      - run: ruff check bim_ai tests

      - run: pytest

      - name: Optional evidence-package staging probe
        env:
          BIM_AI_EVIDENCE_PROBE_BASE_URL: ${{ vars.BIM_AI_EVIDENCE_PROBE_BASE_URL }}
          BIM_AI_EVIDENCE_PROBE_MODEL_ID: ${{ vars.BIM_AI_EVIDENCE_PROBE_MODEL_ID }}
        run: bash scripts/ci-evidence-package-probe.sh

# Lockfile: app/uv.lock — generated by `uv lock`.
# To update deps: edit pyproject.toml, then run `cd app && uv lock`, then commit both files.
# CI enforces lockfile freshness via `uv lock --check`.

[project]
name = "bim-ai-app"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "BIM AI FastAPI backend (browser-first BIM v1)."
requires-python = ">=3.12"
dependencies = [
    "fastapi>=0.115,<1",
    "uvicorn[standard]>=0.32,<1",
    "sqlalchemy[asyncio]>=2.0,<3",
    "asyncpg>=0.30,<1",
    "pydantic>=2.9,<3",
    "pydantic-settings>=2.6,<3",
    "python-multipart>=0.0.12,<1",
    "reportlab>=4.2,<5",
    "numpy>=1.26,<3",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = [
    "pytest>=8.3,<9",
    "pytest-asyncio>=0.24,<1",
    "pytest-cov>=6.0,<7",
    "ruff>=0.7,<1",
]

ifc = [
    # Wheels available for many platforms; pin floor for repeatable CI.
    "ifcopenshell>=0.8.1,<0.9",
]

dxf = [
    # FED-04: DXF underlay parser. Pure-Python; no native deps.
    "ezdxf>=1.4,<2",
]

[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
packages = ["bim_ai"]

[tool.ruff]
line-length = 100
target-version = "py312"
extend-exclude = [".venv", "__pycache__", "node_modules"]

[tool.ruff.lint]
select = ["E", "F", "I", "B", "UP", "W"]
ignore = ["E501"]

[tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores]
"bim_ai/routes_api.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_exports.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_commands.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_activity.py" = ["B008"]
"bim_ai/routes_sketch.py" = ["B008"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]
asyncio_mode = "auto"
addopts = "--cov=bim_ai --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=65"

[tool.coverage.run]
source = ["bim_ai"]
omit = ["bim_ai/export_ifc.py"]

[tool.coverage.report]
exclude_lines = [
    "pragma: no cover",
    "if TYPE_CHECKING:",
    "raise NotImplementedError",
]
